headline: A Look At Albemarle’s Valuation After Its Strong 1 Year Shareholder Return
summary: Why Albemarle is on investors’ radar today Albemarle (ALB) has drawn interest after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at US$190.88 and showing mixed returns over the past week, month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Albemarle. The latest move higher comes after a 1 month share price return of 7.71% and a year to date share price return of 32.62%, alongside a very large 1 year total shareholder return of 231.73%. Together, these figures point to strong momentum...
